---
title: "UIAO Substrate Status"
description: "At-a-glance view of the substrate manifest, workspace contract, active adapters, and CI enforcement stack."
uiao.id: narrative-substrate-status
uiao.status: Current
uiao.owner: WhalerMike
uiao.tags: [status, reference, substrate, adapter, ci]
provenance:
  source_commit: main
  derived_from:
    - src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/workspace-contract.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml
  derived_at: "2026-05-10"
  derived_by: "substrate status page — human-readable snapshot of machine-readable substrate state"
---

# UIAO Substrate Status

Snapshot of the substrate's current state, derived from the canonical artifacts listed in the provenance block above. This page is regenerable: running `make walk` produces the same facts in machine form; this page renders them for humans.

::: {.callout-note}
## 2026-05-10 refresh — partial

The high-level claims (topology, adapter inventory, drift taxonomy, CI
stack, document count) have been re-verified against canon as of today.

**The per-document UIAO_NNN table further down still reflects the
2026-04-17 baseline of 38 entries.** The canon has since grown to 81
registered documents; rows for UIAO_004–009, UIAO_132–176, and UIAO_202
have not yet been populated. They are listed in the "Documents not yet
classified" note at the end of that section; a programmatic
regenerator is the right long-term fix rather than per-document
hand-curation.
:::

## Topology

Post-consolidation (April 2026, ADR-028 / ADR-032), the original three-module
topology (`core/`, `docs/`, `impl/`) collapsed into a single Python package
at [`src/uiao/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao) plus
the documentation site at [`docs/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/docs).
The substrate manifest ([`src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml),
UIAO_200) still carries the pre-consolidation module list for historical
provenance; new code lands under `src/uiao/`.

| Module | Role | Canon consumer | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`src/uiao/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao) | authority + implementation | — | Schemas, canon documents, control library, Python CLI, generators, adapters, substrate walker |
| [`docs/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/docs) | consumer | yes | Articles, guides, narrative, rendered Quarto site |

Workspace root: `$UIAO_WORKSPACE_ROOT` (never hardcoded — see [`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/AGENTS.md) for the canon-consumer convention).

## Adapter registry

Source: [`src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml) + [`src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml).

### Modernization adapters (change-making)

The modernization registry has grown to **24 entries** since 2026-04-17 (was 10). The Phase-1 anchor set:

| Adapter | Status | Phase | Mission class | FedRAMP | Vendor |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `entra-id` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | Microsoft |
| `m365` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | Microsoft |
| `service-now` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | ServiceNow |
| `palo-alto` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | Palo Alto Networks |
| `scuba` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | CISA |
| `terraform` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | HashiCorp / OpenTofu |
| `cyberark` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | CyberArk |
| `infoblox` | active | phase-1 | integration | **Moderate, CDM-integrated** | Infoblox |
| `bluecat-address-manager` | active | phase-1 | integration | — | BlueCat |
| `mainframe` | reserved | phase-planning | integration | — | IBM |

Plus 14 entries registered since 2026-04-17 (Entra orgpath / dynamic-groups
/ admin-units / device-orgpath / policy-targeting, orgtree-drift-engine,
defender-for-cloud-apps-actions, azure-policy-arc, entra-id-governance,
entra-workload-identity, and others). See
[`modernization-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml)
for the authoritative list.

**Active vs reserved breakdown:** of the 24 registered, the majority are
active; reserved entries (`mainframe`, `defender-for-cloud-apps-actions`,
`azure-policy-arc`, `entra-id-governance`, `entra-workload-identity`)
block on vendor sandbox access or upstream capability.

### Conformance adapters (read-only)

**28 entries** as of 2026-05-10. See
[`adapter-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml)
for the complete list. Notable: `scubagear` (CISA SCuBA assessor; the
canonical Phase-1 conformance/policy adapter for M365), `defender-for-*`
family, the attribute-service family (`dcsa-clearance`, `dhs-everify`,
`gsa-sam`, `irs-tin`, `treasury-ofac`, `uscis-immigration`,
`va-veteran`), `id-me-federation-service`, `ccm-bir`,
`azure-migrate`.

### Test-tier status

Per [UIAO_131 Adapter Test Strategy](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/adapter-test-strategy.md), every adapter is tested across three tiers: live commercial tenant (tier 1), contract fixtures (tier 2), reference deployment against a partner agency's GCC-Moderate tenant (tier 3). UIAO lives outside the federal boundary — this table is the honest map of what's been exercised.

| Adapter | Registry status | Tier 1 (live) | Tier 2 (contract) | Tier 3 (reference) | Gate achievable |
|---|---|:-:|:-:|:-:|---|
| `entra-id` | active | ⏳ pending (live tenant) | ✅ scheduler-wired | 🚫 none | dispatches through UIAO_100 scheduler; live tenant via M365 Developer Program pending |
| `m365` | active | ⏳ pending | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | fixture setup required for `beta` |
| `service-now` | active | 🟡 **workflow shipped** ([`tier1-service-now.yml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/.github/workflows/tier1-service-now.yml)) | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | manual-dispatch live; nightly cron unlocks once `SERVICENOW_PDI_*` secrets populated |
| `palo-alto` | active | 🟡 **workflow shipped** ([`tier1-palo-alto.yml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/.github/workflows/tier1-palo-alto.yml)) | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | manual-dispatch live; cron unlocks once `PANOS_HOST` / `PANOS_API_KEY` secrets populated |
| `scuba` | active | ⏳ pending | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | ScubaGear fixture + live run |
| `terraform` | active | ✅ **55 tests** | ✅ fixture + scheduler-wired | 🚫 none | first real adapter wired into UIAO_100 scheduler (§1.5) |
| `cyberark` | active | 🟡 **workflow shipped** ([`tier1-cyberark.yml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/.github/workflows/tier1-cyberark.yml)) | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | manual-dispatch live; cron unlocks once `CYBERARK_TENANT` / `_CLIENT_ID` / `_CLIENT_SECRET` populated |
| `infoblox` | active | 🟥 blocked | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | No public developer sandbox — exclusion per UIAO_131 §5.1 |
| `bluecat-address-manager` | active | 🟥 excluded | ⏳ pending | 🚫 none | Vendor-contact-only access — exclusion per UIAO_131 §5.1 |
| `mainframe` | reserved | N/A | N/A | N/A | No impl; no target |

Legend: ✅ green · 🟡 workflow shipped, secrets pending · ⏳ pending (author work required) · 🟥 blocked/excluded · 🚫 requires partner agency · N/A not applicable

**Reality 2026-05-10:** still zero adapters have completed tier-1 evidence,
but three (`cyberark`, `palo-alto`, `service-now`) now have manual-dispatch
tier-1 workflow scaffolds awaiting secret population. `terraform` remains
the only adapter green on both tier-1 and tier-2. All currently-`active`
registry entries continue to sit above the UIAO_131 conformance gate
threshold — flagged below as substrate drift.

## Canon invariants

Every registered modernization adapter satisfies the four canon invariants, schema-enforced:

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate` *(Amazon Connect exception noted per-adapter)*
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Document registry

Source: [`src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml).

**Reserved ranges:**

| Range | Purpose | Examples |
|---|---|---|
| `UIAO_001` | Single Source of Truth | `UIAO-SSOT.md` |
| `UIAO_002–099` | Top-level canon documents | UIAO_002 SCuBA Spec, UIAO_003 Adapter Segmentation Overview, UIAO_004 Executive Orders |
| `UIAO_100–199` | Subsystem specifications | UIAO_100 Compliance Orchestrator, UIAO_110 Drift Engine Spec, UIAO_121–124 Adapter-framework specs |
| `UIAO_200–299` | Operational / runtime artifacts | UIAO_200 Substrate Manifest, UIAO_201 Workspace Contract |
| `UIAO_900–999` | Test fixtures | — |

**81 documents registered as of 2026-05-10** (from 32 at the 2026-04-17 snapshot — UIAO_004–009, UIAO_132–176, and UIAO_202 added since). The per-document implementation-reality map below covers the 2026-04-17 baseline of 38 entries; the 43 newer documents are listed under "Documents not yet classified" at the end of this section.

| UIAO_NNN | Doc | Spec | Impl | Deployed | Real today? |
|---|---|:-:|:-:|:-:|---|
| UIAO_001 | [SSOT](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO-SSOT.md) | ✅ | n/a (doctrine) | referenced across substrate | ✅ |
| UIAO_002 | [SCuBA Spec](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_002_SCuBA_Technical_Specification_v1.0.md) | ✅ | impl/ CLI exists | partial (no live run) | 🟡 partial |
| UIAO_003 | [Adapter Segmentation](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_003_Adapter_Segmentation_Overview_v1.0.md) | ✅ | registry enforces | 10 registered adapters | ✅ |
| UIAO_004 | [Executive Orders](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/compliance/executive-orders.md) | ✅ | n/a (doctrine) | — | ✅ declared |
| UIAO_100 | [Compliance Orchestrator](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/Compliance-Orchestrator.md) | ✅ | scheduler shipped | `uiao orchestrator schedule`; 14 unit + 1 e2e test | 🟡 partial |
| UIAO_101 | Platform Overview | ✅ | partial | — | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_102 | Platform Services Layer | ✅ | partial | — | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_103 | [Spec-Test Enforcement](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/UIAO-Spec-Test-Enforcement.md) | ✅ | enforcement mechanism shipped | RFC 2119 audit + CI gate; coverage doc baselined | ✅ complete |
| UIAO_104 | Test Harness & CI | ✅ | impl | CI running | ✅ |
| UIAO_105 | Auditor API | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/api/`; v1 routers for ZTMM / EPL / Enforcement / Archive plus pre-existing `/api/auditor` (`evidence` / `findings` / `POA&M` / OSCAL endpoints); 21 tests | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_106 | Compliance CLI | ✅ | impl | `uiao` CLI ships in v0.2.1 | ✅ |
| UIAO_107 | Collector Interface | ✅ | partial | — | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_108 | CQL | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/governance/cql.py`; 5 canonical queries; `/api/v1/cql/*` endpoints; 42 tests | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_109 | Data Lake Model | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/storage/data_lake.py`; per-adapter retention from canon `retention-years:`; FilesystemArchive backend; 24 tests | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_110 | Drift Engine | ✅ | **all 5 classes shipped** (SCHEMA + PROVENANCE in walker; SEMANTIC + AUTHZ + IDENTITY in runtime modules) | walker + runtime | ✅ complete (see drift taxonomy table below) |
| UIAO_111 | Enforcement Runtime | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/governance/enforcement.py`; 5 default handlers; EnforcementJournal JSONL audit trail; 25 tests | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_112 | Multi-Tenant Isolation | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/governance/tenancy.py`; tenant model + namespace primitives + walker hygiene gate; 37 tests (UIAO_119 v1 added 13) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_113 | [Evidence Graph](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/graph-schema.md) | ✅ | working | scheduler-run ingestion + 4-emitter OSCAL augmentation + back-matter link resources; 62 tests | ✅ |
| UIAO_114 | HA / Fault Tolerance | ✅ | — | **deferred to Phase 2** per [§4.4 assessment](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.html) | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_115 | Performance Engineering | ✅ | — | **deferred pending baseline** per [§4.4 assessment](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.html) | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_116 | EPL | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/governance/epl.py`; 5 reference policies in `src/uiao/canon/policies/`; 29 tests; OSCAL back-matter projection | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_117 | Recovery Layer | ✅ | Phase 1 shipped | Raw-Zone immutability + checkpoint label in `src/uiao/storage/data_lake.py`; manual SOP for Class A/B in [Phase 1 record](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_117-phase1-recovery.html); Phase 2 deferred per [§4.4 assessment](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.html); 32 tests | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_118 | Release Engineering | ✅ | impl | release.yml signs v0.2.1 | ✅ |
| UIAO_119 | Tenancy Strategy | ✅ | **all action items shipped** | v1 / v2 / tagging / check-points / API filter / sandbox / ops runbook / plane flags / [CLI promote-preview](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-cli-tenant-promote.html) / CQL experimental ops — see the [§4.4 assessment](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.html) for the full table of links. CQL `regex` op gated by `auditor-api.cql.experimental-ops` ([CQL exp ops](../programs/project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-cql-experimental-ops.html)) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_120 | Zero-Trust Integration | ✅ | core impl | `src/uiao/governance/ztmm.py`; 16 active adapters declare `ztmm-pillars:`; 30 tests; OSCAL back-matter resources surfaced | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_121 | Adapter Conformance TP | ✅ (template) | 2 instantiations | [`terraform`](../customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/terraform/terraform.html) (30/30 PASS) + [`entra-id`](../customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/entra-id/entra-id.html) (30/30 PASS, tier-1 pending); also referenced by [scubagear conformance plan](../programs/test-plans/scubagear-conformance-test-plan.html) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_122 | Adapter Developer Training | ✅ (subset of UIAO_125) | — | — | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_123 | Adapter Integration TP | ✅ (template) | 2 instantiations | [`terraform`](../customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/terraform/terraform.html) (Phases 1–3 PASS) + [`entra-id`](../customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/entra-id/entra-id.html) (Phases 1–3 PASS); both pending Phase 4–5 (live creds) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_124 | Adapter Ops Runbook | ✅ | first instance shipped | [UIAO_119 canary → regulated rollout SOP](../programs/ops-runbook/2026-04-26-uiao_119-canary-rollout.html) (closes §4.4 assessment action 119.5) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_125 | Training Program | ✅ | first delivery shipped | [adapter-author onboarding session record (2026-04-26)](../programs/training/2026-04-26-adapter-author-onboarding.html) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_126 | Test Plans Program | ✅ | first delivery shipped | [scubagear conformance test plan](../programs/test-plans/scubagear-conformance-test-plan.html) instantiates UIAO_121 | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_127 | Project Plans Program | ✅ | first delivery shipped | [Acme Federal modernization plan](../programs/project-plans/agency-acme-modernization-plan.html) (synthetic reference shape) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_128 | Education Program | ✅ | first delivery shipped | [agency onboarding walkthrough](../programs/education/agency-onboarding-walkthrough.html) (15-min CIO/CISO read) | 🟡 working |
| UIAO_129 | [Application Identity Model](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/application-identity-model.md) | ✅ | spec only | — | 🟡 spec, no impl |
| UIAO_130 | [App Identity Onboarding Runbook](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/application-identity-onboarding-runbook.md) | ✅ | spec only | — | 🟡 spec, no impl |
| UIAO_131 | Adapter Test Strategy | ✅ | — | 0 adapters have any tier evidence | ⚠️ aspirational |
| UIAO_200 | Substrate Manifest | ✅ | impl enforces | substrate walker uses daily | ✅ |
| UIAO_201 | Workspace Contract | ✅ | impl enforces | `$UIAO_WORKSPACE_ROOT` in use | ✅ |

### Summary

Counts below cover the 38 documents enumerated in the table above (the
2026-04-17 baseline). Today's canon has 81 registered documents; the
remaining 43 are listed in "Documents not yet classified" below.

- **✅ Real today:** 11 of 38 enumerated artifacts (UIAO_001, 003, 004, 103, 104, 106, 110, 113, 118, 200, 201)
- **🟡 Partially implemented / working:** 20 (UIAO_002, 100, 105, 108, 109, 111, 112, 116, 117, 119, 120, 121, 123, 124, 125, 126, 127, 128, 129, 130)
- **⚠️ Aspirational or draft:** 7 (UIAO_101, 102, 107, 114, 115, 122, 131)

That's the honest state for the baselined subset. An aspirational banner is
applied per ADR-030 §6 to pages describing ⚠️ and 🟡 artifacts.

### Documents not yet classified (added since 2026-04-17)

The following 43 documents are registered in canon but have not yet been
classified into the implementation-reality table above. They require
per-document audit (spec status, impl status, deployed status) before being
folded in. Listed by document-registry order:

- **UIAO_004 – UIAO_009** — top-level canon (6 docs).
- **UIAO_132 – UIAO_137** — subsystem specs in the 130s range (6 docs).
- **UIAO_140 – UIAO_143** — subsystem specs (4 docs).
- **UIAO_150 – UIAO_176** — operational/runtime artifacts in the 150–170s
  range (26 docs), including the FedRAMP CR26 catalog vendoring work
  (ADR-061), the orgtree CLI surface, the SCuBAGear upstream-track
  integration, and the various Phase-2 modernization adapter additions.
- **UIAO_202** — UIAO Image Registry (the canonical figure registry that
  the image-generation pipeline writes through).

Until the table above is regenerated, the canonical source for each of
these documents is
[`document-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml)
plus its referenced artifact path.

## CI enforcement stack

Source: [`.github/workflows/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/.github/workflows).
**24 workflow files as of 2026-05-10** (was 7 substantive at the
2026-04-17 snapshot). Grouped by role:

### Blocking gates on every relevant PR

| Workflow | Trigger | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `schema-validation.yml` | Canon / schema PRs | JSON-schema validation of every registry, manifest, frontmatter edit |
| `pytest.yml` | `src/uiao/**`, `tests/**`, `pyproject.toml` | Substrate fast + full suite |
| `substrate-drift.yml` | Canon / substrate / workspace PRs | DRIFT-SCHEMA + DRIFT-PROVENANCE detection |
| `metadata-validator.yml` | `src/uiao/canon/**/*.md` + metadata schema | Canonical frontmatter enforcement |
| `quarto.yml` | `docs/**` PRs | Render block; deploy on main |
| `adapter-conformance.yml` | `src/uiao/adapters/**` + adapter tests | Per-adapter conformance contract |
| `ruff.yml` | Python PRs | Lint baseline cleared (230 → 0 findings) |
| `mypy.yml` | Python PRs | Type-check baseline cleared (130 → 0 findings) |
| `link-check.yml` | `*.md` / `*.qmd` PRs + weekly cron | Lychee, blocking since 2026-04-25 |
| `spec-test-coverage.yml` | spec + test changes | UIAO_103 spec-test enforcement (RFC 2119 audit) |
| `sync-canon-check.yml` | canon sync | Canon-sync determinism |
| `docs-leak-check.yml` | `docs/**` | Forbids `evidence/**` paths under `docs/**` |
| `fedramp-cr26-roundtrip.yml` | FedRAMP CR26 catalog edits | Vendored-catalog roundtrip (ADR-061) |

### Pipeline workflows (run on schedule / dispatch / events)

| Workflow | Trigger | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `acceptance-tests.yml` | dispatch | Acceptance bundle |
| `conmon-aggregate.yml` | scheduled / dispatch | Continuous monitoring aggregation |
| `diagrams-ci.yaml` | diagrams source edits | Mermaid + PlantUML render gate |
| `image-gen.yml` | dispatch / placeholder changes | Gemini Nano Banana harvest + scan |
| `orchestrator-schedule-nightly.yml` | nightly cron | UIAO_100 scheduler nightly run |
| `pester.yml` | PowerShell source edits | Pester test gate for PowerShell modules |
| `scubagear-upstream-track.yml` | scheduled | Tracks CISA SCuBA upstream releases |

### Tier-1 adapter workflows (manual-dispatch, secrets pending)

| Workflow | Adapter | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `tier1-cyberark.yml` | `cyberark` | Manual-dispatch; nightly cron once `CYBERARK_*` secrets populated |
| `tier1-palo-alto.yml` | `palo-alto` | Manual-dispatch; nightly cron once `PANOS_*` secrets populated |
| `tier1-service-now.yml` | `service-now` | Manual-dispatch; nightly cron once `SERVICENOW_PDI_*` secrets populated |

### Release / draft workflows

| Workflow | Trigger | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `release.yml` | `v*.*.*` tag | Wheel + sdist + CycloneDX SBOM + sigstore signing |
| `release-drafter.yml` | every main push / PR label | Maintains the draft release |

**13 blocking gates** (up from 7 at the 2026-04-17 snapshot). The increase
reflects the `mypy` and `ruff` baselines being cleared since then (both
flipped to blocking), and new blocking gates for adapter conformance,
spec-test coverage, canon-sync, docs leak-check, and the FedRAMP CR26
catalog roundtrip.

## Drift taxonomy

Five classes defined in [`docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd`](16_DriftDetectionStandard.html):

| Class | Detected by | Severity max | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DRIFT-SCHEMA` | `uiao substrate walk` | P1 | **implemented** |
| `DRIFT-PROVENANCE` | `uiao substrate walk` | P1 | **implemented** |
| `DRIFT-SEMANTIC` | runtime — `src/uiao/freshness/drift_semantic.py` evaluates scheduler-run evidence against per-adapter `freshness-window-hours`; fallback chain registry→family→global | P2 | ✅ complete |
| `DRIFT-AUTHZ` | runtime — `src/uiao/governance/drift.py::classify_authz_drift` (state-diff: role/delegation/escalation) **+** `src/uiao/governance/consent_envelope.py::ConsentEnvelopeValidator` (registry consent envelope: out-of-scope object access). Substrate walker scans both registries for missing/empty `scope:` declarations | P1 | ✅ complete |
| `DRIFT-IDENTITY` | runtime — `src/uiao/governance/drift.py::classify_identity_drift` (state-diff: OrgPath / lifecycle / required-field) **+** `src/uiao/governance/issuer_resolution.py::IssuerResolver` (runtime issuer-chain: terminal-issuer match against canon `trust-anchor:`). Substrate walker scans both registries for missing `trust-anchor:` declarations on `certificate-anchored: true` adapters | P1 | ✅ complete |

All five drift classes are now implemented as of 2026-05-10 — the
2026-04-17 closing note about runtime classes being "future engineering
work" is superseded by the runtime modules cited in the table above
(`src/uiao/freshness/drift_semantic.py`,
`src/uiao/governance/drift.py`,
`src/uiao/governance/consent_envelope.py`,
`src/uiao/governance/issuer_resolution.py`).

Runtime classes are anchored in `src/uiao/canon/specs/drift.md` (UIAO_110);
ADR-029 §Consequences references the original phasing plan.

## Aspirational-content triage

A grep-heuristic scan across all rendered `.qmd` and `.md` in `docs/` found **283 files with 692 matches** for aspirational-signal phrases (`not yet implemented | coming soon | TBD | TODO | placeholder | aspirational | proposed | draft | stub | to be defined | planned | roadmap | will be | future | intends to`).

The scan is intentionally noisy — about 30–40% are false positives (session logs using "planned" in past-tense context, status dashboards naturally listing roadmaps, glossaries defining terms). Full triage report: [`inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md).

**Mechanically flagged as aspirational** (via Lua filter + `aspirational: true` frontmatter — see PR #57):

- ~~All program pages (UIAO_125–128) and narrative companions — 9 pages~~ → un-flagged 2026-04-26 once UIAO_125–128 each shipped a first delivery (roadmap §3.8 + §4.3 round 1).
- Series landings + book landing — 4 pages
- All `PHASE5_*.qmd` files — 8 pages
- All `customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/*` — 11 pages (13 → 11 as `terraform` and `entra-id` flipped to active per §2.6 / 2026-04-26)
- All `customer-documents/adapter-specs/*` — 5 pages (7 → 5 once `terraform` and `scubagear` flipped to active in §4.3 round 3)
- `docs/docs/canon/migration-plan.md`, `docs/docs/mvp-roadmap.qmd`

**Total flagged ≈ 22 pages (~4% of the 504 rendered surfaces).** Selective flagging preserves signal — a banner on half the site is noise.

The remaining 263 hits are under per-file review; not mass-flagged pending author judgment.

## Open backlog (2026-05-10)

Prioritized punch list of substrate-level work still open. Smaller items
are tracked in GitHub issues; larger ones are flagged for planning passes.

### Tier 1 — finish the things almost done

1. **Populate tier-1 adapter secrets** for `cyberark`, `palo-alto`,
   `service-now`. Workflows are scaffolded and waiting; populating
   the named secrets in repo settings flips three adapters from
   "🟡 workflow shipped" to "✅ live tenant."
2. **Refresh the per-document UIAO_NNN classification table** above —
   43 documents added since 2026-04-17 (UIAO_004–009, 132–176, 202)
   are unclassified. A programmatic regenerator that reads
   `document-registry.yaml` and per-doc frontmatter would be the
   right long-term fix.
3. **Customer-documents ROADMAP — generate the 47 image placeholders.**
   All inline `[IMAGE-NN: ...]` markers are planted and the pipeline
   sidecars are routed. Requires `GEMINI_API_KEY` on the
   `image-gen.yml` workflow to flip from harvest-only to generate.

### Tier 2 — substrate gaps with named owners

4. **UIAO_131 Adapter Test Strategy** — 0 of 10 modernization adapters
   have completed tier-1 or tier-2 evidence. This is the largest single
   concentrated gap. Tier 1 work converges with item 1 above; tier 2
   (contract fixtures) is per-adapter author work.
5. **UIAO_114 HA / Fault Tolerance** — deferred to Phase 2 per the
   2026-04-26 §4.4 assessment. Needs a kickoff plan.
6. **UIAO_115 Performance Engineering** — deferred pending baseline
   measurement infrastructure (same §4.4 assessment).
7. **UIAO_101 Platform Overview / UIAO_102 Platform Services Layer**
   — partial impl. Spec authored; runtime crosswalk incomplete.
8. **UIAO_107 Collector Interface** — partial. Needs a canonical
   collector contract distinct from the adapter contract.
9. **UIAO_129 / UIAO_130 Application Identity Model + Onboarding
   Runbook** — specs exist, no impl. Required before workload-identity
   adapters can fully conform.

### Tier 3 — known doctrine cleanups

10. **Rename top-level `canon/` to `models/`** per AGENTS.md (collides
    with `src/uiao/canon/` which is the canon authority). Mechanical
    rename + reference updates.
11. **Triage the 263 unreviewed aspirational-signal grep hits** flagged
    in §"Aspirational-content triage" below.
12. **Phase 2 placeholder scaffolds** under `phase2/` — most
    domain/lifecycle/transformation files are scaffolds pending design
    sessions per AGENTS.md.

### Tier 4 — soft follow-ups dependent on external action

13. **Customer-documents case-study patterns → real engagements.**
    Promotion requires reviewed, externally-releasable engagement
    material from sponsors.
14. **Tier-3 reference deployments.** All 10 modernization adapters
    show 🚫 for tier-3 because the substrate operates outside any
    federal boundary; needs a partner agency.

## Optimization posture

Cumulative from the consolidation (2026-04-17):

- **History preserved:** 3,549 commits across the four predecessor repos
- **Working-tree reduction:** ~290 MB (128.9 MB via pngquant, 160 MB of tracked build artifacts retired, 795 KB of junk text files removed)
- **Dead code retired:** 38 Python files (~1,600 LOC) of ARC-5 scaffolding under `directory_migration/` + 3 stub duplicate provider adapters
- **Quality burn-down:** 16 ruff errors fixed (gate flipped to blocking), 4 slug-style `document_id`s renumbered, 10 mechanical stale-ref fixes

## How to verify any of this

```bash
# Validate schemas (canon YAML/JSON vs their JSON Schemas)
make schemas

# Walk the substrate (structural + provenance drift)
make walk

# Run substrate walker tests only (fast)
make test-substrate

# Render this page as part of the full site
make docs
```

Every cell above is regenerable from the canonical artifacts. If this page disagrees with the live `src/uiao/canon/*.yaml`, **the canon wins** — this page is a derived view, not a source.
